other_observers: none; SeEtta Moss found the bird earlier in the day, around 11am in the same area and got photos.
duration: 30 seconds the bird was in the open and then heard several times after that, though couldn't se
description: I only got a brief look at the bird. The creamy orange/yellow underparts, with four black stripes on the head, one going through each eye. The bird had a olive green colored back and tail. The tail was short. The eyes were dark. That was all I saw.Behaviors: In tangles low to the ground, near some other birds.Call: Bird giving a high "zeet zeet" call that I've heard before. I think it was giving this when it was flying around.Plumage: adult
